chapter goal: What Euclidean constructions become clearer when the invisible circular points are included?
computational checks: cross-ratio invariance under a projective reparametrization
join/meet incidence for generated homogeneous points
mode-specific conic or hyperbolic numeric check when relevant
gaps: Proof-heavy material in Chapter 19 is represented by measurement diagrams, determinant/cross-ratio checks, or small parameter experiments rather than copied text.

visual sequence.expected_observation: The absolute conic decides which transformations preserve angle or distance.
visual sequence.learner_inspection_target: For Chapter 19, inspect mirror image as projective reflection by identifying which objects instantiate mirror images.

visual sequence.validation_target: absolute-conic pole/polar checks and distance sample are finite
